# Threads to Millions

> Threads to Millions is a community and course teaching creators how to grow and monetize on the Threads social media platform.

## Site Info
- URL: https://threadstomillions.com
- Founded by: Lexie (@getdigitalwithlexie)
- Community: 5,200+ members on Skool
- Course: 25 modules, 495+ post templates, DM strategies, marketing psychology training
- Method: The STAR Method (Story First, Teach for Free, 80/20 Engagement, Sell in the Downthread)
- Price: $97 lifetime access
- Affiliate commission: 80%

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://threadstomillions.com - Course overview, STAR Method, testimonials, FAQ
- Blog: https://threadstomillions.com/blog - 33 guides on Threads growth and monetization

## Blog Topics

### Monetization
- https://threadstomillions.com/blog/threads-monetization-requirements - Requirements and 4 ways creators get paid on Threads
- https://threadstomillions.com/blog/how-to-get-paid-on-threads - Step-by-step guide to earning on Threads
- https://threadstomillions.com/blog/can-you-make-money - Real income data and monetization paths
- https://threadstomillions.com/blog/threads-monetization-blueprint-2026 - Complete monetization blueprint
- https://threadstomillions.com/blog/does-threads-pay-creators-2026 - Creator payment programs and alternatives

### Growth
- https://threadstomillions.com/blog/threads-algorithm-2026 - How the Threads algorithm works
- https://threadstomillions.com/blog/threads-algorithm-reset-2026 - How to reset the algorithm when reach drops
- https://threadstomillions.com/blog/how-to-grow-on-threads-2026 - Growth strategies for Threads
- https://threadstomillions.com/blog/10-proven-hooks - Viral opening lines for Threads posts
- https://threadstomillions.com/blog/profile-optimization - Optimizing your Threads profile

### Strategy
- https://threadstomillions.com/blog/threads-for-business-2026 - Using Threads for business
- https://threadstomillions.com/blog/star-method-explained - The STAR Method framework
- https://threadstomillions.com/blog/four-content-pillars - Content pillar strategy
- https://threadstomillions.com/blog/dm-strategy - DM conversion strategies
- https://threadstomillions.com/blog/engagement-hacks - Engagement optimization

### Platform
- https://threadstomillions.com/blog/threads-app-guide-2026 - Complete Threads app guide
